about.title: Sabinas
about.subtitle: Wellness · Traditional Medicine · Bacalar
about.description: Sabinas is a vision of the weaving and union of knowledge from the roots that guide the flow of the waters. A project that attempts to unite the dreams that allow us to inhabit our Earth with tenderness and devotion. It is a prayer to the waters, to memory, and to every encounter that makes our lives special.
about.roni_sub: Originally from the mountains of Oaxaca
about.roni_description: She learned from her grandmothers and her mother the art of the rebozo, plant medicine, and the strength of prayer. Licenciada in Social Work, specialist in environmental education, with a Master's in Anthropology of Health. She has held women's circles, created socio-environmental projects, and collaborated in eco-villages in Mexico and Brazil.

oracle.title: The Service Oracle
oracle.via_a_desc: Search directly for the experience that resonates with you.
oracle.via_b_title: Discover what is suggested for you
oracle.via_b_desc: Let the oracle guide you toward your ideal medicine.
oracle.no_results: No services found. Try a different search.
oracle.q1: How do you wish to live this experience?
oracle.q1_c: In the energy of the community (Group)
oracle.q2: Where does your attention need to go today?
oracle.q2_a: To the physical body — massages & release
oracle.q2_b: To the spirit and energy — ceremonies
oracle.q2_c: To the mind and learning — workshops
oracle.q3: What level of immersion are you looking for?
oracle.q4_cuerpo: What texture will best heal your body today?
oracle.q4_cuerpo_a: The fluidity of Water — flowing, lagoon
oracle.q4_cuerpo_b: The grounding of Earth — clay, deep pressure
oracle.q4_cuerpo_c: The warmth of Fire — hot stones, steam
oracle.q4_espiritu: What form of contact are you seeking with the sacred?
oracle.q4_mente: What kind of wisdom calls to you?
oracle.q5: In one word, your intention when you leave Sabinas will be…
oracle.results_sub: The oracle has spoken. These paths resonate with you:
